# Software Development

**Category:** Technology Domain

## Why it matters

While not every Language Technologist will chose this path, the best way to learn how a programmer thinks is to become one. This will permit you to quickly draft a software solution to a problem or to help find and test the relevant code in a bug report.

## Target competency

> Can develop or improve a software solution to a complex problem.

## Progression by component

_Suggested activities to reach each outcome level._

### 1.0 — General

| Level | Suggested activities |
| --- | --- |
| **Learner** | Find out what languages are used to program the tools you use. Explore a programming language that may be applicable to your work. |
| **Advanced Beginner** | Start to learn a the basic levels of a programming language, for example, Python, Perl or Javascript. |
| **Practitioner** | Plan and develop a utility or participate in open source projects to apply your new skills. |
| **Trainer/Proficient** | Work with others to maintain a complex application, complete with proper error handling and documentation. |
| **Expert** | — |
